---
title: "Quarto Document"
author: "Sohyun Park"
toc: true
number-sections: true
highlight-style: pygments
format: 
  html: 
    code-fold: true
    html-math-method: katex
  pdf: 
    geometry: 
      - top=30mm
      - left=20mm
  docx: default
---

[Quarto Document](https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/authoring/vscode.html)
